name: com.undercurrentholdings/aegis
description: Six-gate quantitative governance for AI agents: risk, profit, novelty, complexity, quality, and utility gates return PROCEED/PAUSE/HALT/ESCALATE decisions with hash-chained audit trails and NIST AI RMF / EU AI Act artifacts.

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional — omit for sandbox mode (10 evaluations/day). Free Community key (100/month) at https://portal.undercurrentholdings.com

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY — free key from https://portal.undercurrentholdings.com (Community tier, 100 evaluations/month)
